title: UC Davis - RadioImmuno Assay (RIA) Protocol
author: Peter Havel

steps_raw.instruction: Follow kit instructions for preparing standards and all reagents.
Follow kit instructions for volumes and incubation times. Pipet standards and samples . Pipet antibody and tracer. Incubate.
Follow kit instructions for volumes and incubation times. Add precipitating reagent. Incubate.
